SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AcceptEventInviteFragment
This fragment allows the user to accept an event invite.
AccountTypeActivity
This activity is used to select the account type for the user.
AdminEventCommentsActivity
This activity is used to display the comments for an event.
AdminEventDetailActivity
This activity is used to display the details of an event.
AdminEventsFragment
This fragment is used to show events in Admin view
AdminHomeActivity
Main home screen for the admin role.
AdminImageDetailActivity
This activity is used to display the details of an image.
AdminImagesFragment
This fragment is used to show images in Admin view
AdminLoginActivity
This activity is used to login as an admin.
AdminLogsFragment
This fragment is used to show logs in Admin view
AdminProfileDetailActivity
This activity is used to display the details of a profile.
AdminProfilesFragment
This fragment is used to show browse profiles in Admin view
CalendarEventAdapter
Adapter for displaying events on a selected calendar date.
CalendarEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
 
CalendarFragment
Fragment that displays a calendar of all events and the user's registered events.
CategoryAdapter
Adapter for displaying a list of categories with checkboxes.
CommentAdapter
This adapter is used to display the comments for an event.
CommentAdapter
Adapter for displaying comments on an event.
CommentAdapter.OnDeleteClickListener
 
CommentAdapter.OnItemClickListener
 
CommentAdapter.ViewHolder
Provide a reference to the type of views that you are using (custom ViewHolder)
CreateEventFragment
This fragment allows the user to create a new event.
CsvExporter
This class is used to export the registered entrants to a csv file.
CsvExporterTest
Unit tests for CsvExporter https://developer.android.com/training/testing/local-tests https://medium.com/@chetanshingare2991/mastering-android-unit-testing-with-mockito-mocking-for-reliability-and-flexibility-93d42078d2ca Covers: - basic writing - empty list - null output stream - null values for name/email - escaping comma in name/email - escaping quotes - escaping newline characters - single entrant test
EditEventFragment
This fragment allows the user to edit an existing event.
EntrantAdapter
Adapter for displaying entrants in RecyclerViews.
EntrantAdapter.OnCancelClickListener
 
EntrantAdapter.ViewHolder
ViewHolder for each row
EntrantAdapterTest
Unit tests for EntrantAdapter contains: - setting entrants updates the item count - null list clears adapter - binding sets name and email correctly - email fallback when null - cancel button logic correct in both cases (when it works) - unknown name correct fill
EntrantDisplay
UI model for displaying an entrant on the organizer entrants screen.
EntrantDisplayTest
Unit tests for EntrantDisplay.
EntrantListEntry
This class is used to represent an entry in the waitlist for an event.
EntrantListEntryTest
This class is used to test the WaitlistEntry class.
EntrantListFirebase
This class is used to represent the waitlist for an event.
EntrantListFirebaseTest
Unit tests for EntrantListFirebase using Mockito.
EntrantListFirebaseTest
Unit tests for EntrantListFirebase that require the android runtime to work Covers: - getEntry - getEntrantStatus - getWaitlistCount - getEntrantList - getEntrantsByStatus
Event
This class is used to represent an event.
EventAdapter
Adapter class used to connect a list of Event objects to the RecyclerView.
EventAdapter
 
EventAdapter.EventViewHolder
ViewHolder class that holds references to the views for each event item.
EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
Interface used to define click behavior when an event item is selected.
EventAdapter.OnItemClickListener
 
EventComments
This fragment allows the user to view the comments on a specific event
EventDetailsFragment
A simple Fragment subclass.
EventImageRepository
Connecting event images to the firestore database.
EventInviteAdapter
Adapter for displaying event invitations in RecyclerViews.
EventInviteAdapter.ViewHolder
Provide a reference to the type of views that you are using (custom ViewHolder)
EventListFragment
This fragment display a list of public events
EventRepository
Repository class responsible for retrieving and modifying event data.
EventRepository.EventCallback
 
EventRepository.OnDeleteListener
 
EventRepository.SingleEventCallback

EventTest
 
ExampleInstrumentedTest
Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
ExampleUnitTest
Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
GeoRequirementFragment
Fragment that allows an organizer to enable or disable the geolocation requirement for their event.

ImageHelper
Helper class to load images stored as Base64 strings in Firestore.
ImageItem
This class is used to represent an image item.
ImageRepository
 
ImageRepository.DeleteCallback
 
ImageRepository.ImagesCallback
 
ImageUploadHelper
Helper class to pick an image, compress it (to stay under a size limit), and convert to Base64.
ImageUploadHelper.ImageUploadCallback

A simple Fragment subclass.

This class is used to represent a log entry.

LogItem
This class is used to represent a log item.
LogRepository
Repository class for retrieving and formatting log data from Firestore.
LogRepository.LogsCallback
Callback interface used to return logs or an error.
LotterySystem
Basic Lottery System TL;DR, When lottery is triggered, it passes the amount.

A simple Fragment subclass.
Notification
Notification class, premade notification that is called instead of using notificationsystem directly.
NotificationAdapter
Adapter for displaying notifications in RecyclerViews.
NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
 
NotificationFragment
Notification Fragment.
NotificationSystem
NotificationSystem, this should NOT be used directly but yk if someone needs it, yeah, sure.
NotificationSystem.NotificationsCallback
Called with the user's notifications (newest first), or an empty list on none/error.
NotificationSystemTest
Unit tests for NotificationSystem.
NotificationTest
Unit tests for Notification.
